### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>algolia/algoliasearch-client-js</summary>

### [`v3.35.1`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​3351)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/compare/3.35.0...3.35.1)

> 2019-10-08

-   FIX: extra comma on node v8 engine ([#​790](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/issues/790))

### [`v3.35.0`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​3350)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/compare/3.34.0...3.35.0)

> 2019-09-26

-   FEAT(remaining-validity): adds remaining valitity method ([#​778](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/issues/778))
    -   `client.getSecuredApiKeyRemainingValidity('securedAPIKey')`: Gets remaining validity seconds of an secured API Key
-   FEAT(unit-testing-relevance): adds unit testing relevance methods ([#​777](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/issues/777))
    -   `index.findObject(hit => hit.firstname == 'Jimmie')`: Find an object by the given condition
    -   `index.getObjectPosition(results, 'a-unique-identifier')`: Retrieve the given object position in the given results set
-   FEAT(adds-assign-user-ids): adds assignUserIDs method and tests ([#​783](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/issues/783))
    -   `client.assignUserIDs({ cluster: 'c1-test', userIDs: ['some-user-1', 'some-user-2'] })`: Assign a array of userIDs to a cluster

</details>
